title: coriaria angustissima
intro: Coriaria angustissima, also known as New Zealand pepper tree or wharawhara, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic agent. The health benefits of Coriaria angustissima include relief from muscle and joint pain, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Coriaria angustissima is typically prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
